content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Thorough review of the BackendExhausted graceful degradation feature across 19 files, ~2145 lines added. The core feature is well-implemented: FailureClass::BackendExhausted is correctly added as a non-retryable terminal variant, pattern detection in is_backend_exhausted is robust with good false-positive avoidance (transient 429s, short retry-after durations), and panel degradation logic correctly reduces quorum with .min(panel.len() - exhausted).max(1) across all three panel types (final_review, completion, prompt_review). All-exhausted cases correctly propagate BackendExhausted so the engine doesn't retry. Process group kill improvement, snapshot/journal reconciliation, and OpenRouter exhaustion detection are correct. Tests cover all critical paths (26 exhaustion-specific tests pass). Two tangential changes are bundled (unwrap_claude_structured_output_transport_payload fix, max restarts 20→25) but are correct. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
